name: Vespa (Yahoo AI Search Platform)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Vespa Cloud available for managed service

auth.notes: Self-hosted: no auth; Vespa Cloud: API key

performance.notes: Sub-10ms for vector + keyword hybrid search at billion-document scale

agent_readiness.notes: Enterprise AI search and vector database platform from Yahoo. Hybrid search (BM25 + ANN vectors) in a single query. Grouping/aggregation. Real-time updates. Multi-phase ranking with ML models. Supports tensor operations, ONNX model serving, ColBERT re-ranking. HNSW approximate nearest neighbor. Handles billions of documents. Used by Yahoo, Spotify, OkCupid, Verizon Media. More complex than Qdrant/Weaviate but far more powerful for production RAG.

gotchas: Steep learning curve — XML schema definitions, Vespa-specific query language
Not suitable for small/prototype use cases
Requires JVM knowledge for advanced tuning
best_when: Enterprise RAG with multi-phase ranking and ColBERT
When precise control over ranking and recall is required
Search applications needing keyword + vector hybrid at scale
summary: Vespa is Yahoo's battle-tested AI search platform supporting hybrid keyword+vector search at billion-document scale. Multi-phase ML ranking, ColBERT re-ranking, ONNX model serving, and real-time updates. Production-proven at Yahoo, Spotify, OkCupid. Best for enterprise RAG and hybrid search at scale. Steeper learning curve than simpler vector DBs — not suitable for prototyping.
